blended.narrative: Steamboat is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 57°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 4.4" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 54".
